header.subtitle: Senior AI Product Engineer (Fullstack) | React/Next.js | Node.js | Google Cloud | Firebase | AI Agents

professionalSummary: Senior AI Product Engineer with 8+ years of experience building production-ready web, mobile, and backend systems. Strong fullstack background with React, Next.js, React Native, Node.js, TypeScript, Firebase, and Google Cloud. Experienced in building and integrating APIs, backend services, business logic, workflows, payment systems, and AI-powered features. Focused on shipping real product value through scalable architecture, reliable backend integrations, conversational AI, LLM workflows, and context-aware user experiences.

experience.description: Led mobile apps for real transactional flows: checkout, delivery, order validation, and ops. Firebase, GCP logging, API integrations, and production monitoring. AI-assisted workflows for faster delivery; improved reliability with stronger error handling, scalable architecture, and solid business logic.

Built mobile apps for data-driven ops: API integrations, performance-critical features, and production workflows. Used AI tools to speed up implementation, refactors, and docs. Emphasis on clean architecture, reliability, and maintainability.

Tech lead on a scalable fullstack platform: APIs, backend services, cross-tool workflows, business logic, and frontend. AI-assisted and low-code patterns to ship faster and modularize the stack. Shaped architecture, product direction, and integration strategy.

Owned payment, checkout, and risk flows: API integration, transaction validation, and production edge cases. Refactored critical modules as payment and business rules evolved. Prioritized reliability, scalability, and clear UX in financial products.
